scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,PATIENT,PRO,ADMIN -c cyan,magenta,green,yellow "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:patient" "npm run dev:professional" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n API,LANDING,PATIENT,PRO,ADMIN -c cyan,blue,magenta,green,yellow "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:landing" "npm run dev:patient" "npm run dev:professional" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.dev:full: npm run db:up && npm run dev:all
scripts.db:up: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d mysql redis
